examples.description: Link to meeting minutes containing the original discussion

aiGuidance.extraction: Extract any URLs mentioned in the source material that the author intends to link to this decision. Include only explicit URLs, not paraphrased references.
aiGuidance.purpose: One or more URLs to external materials (meeting minutes, reference documents, prior art) that support or contextualise this decision.

description: External reference URLs attached to this decision — documents, minutes, or other materials that provide rationale or context.
name: external_links
